description: Produces a playground prompt exercising state-machine transitions on marketplace listings.
notes: Grounded in the playground-prompts skill catalog entry #15 (marketplace listings). Success is the assistant text mentioning the load-bearing state-machine words and the listing/buyer roles so a reader can verify the rule shape. The skill itself names state-machine transitions as a load-bearing capability for the playground.
prompt: Give me one playground prompt in the 30-50 word range that forces the agent to write Firestore rules enforcing a listing state machine: active → sold and active → withdrawn, with only the seller allowed to withdraw and only purchase records flipping state to sold.
